command:
echo "=== 192.168.0.192 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.192 "bash -s" << 'PEOF'

echo -n "resolv.conf src: "; head -1 /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null
echo -n "symlink: "; readlink /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null || echo "real-file"
echo -n "resolved: "; systemctl is-active systemd-resolved 2>/dev/null
echo -n "NM: "; systemctl is-active NetworkManager 2>/dev/null
echo -n "networking: "; systemctl is-active networking 2>/dev/null
echo -n "networkd: "; systemctl is-active systemd-networkd 2>/dev/null
echo -n "resolvconf-pkg: "; (dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^ii.*resolvconf " && echo yes || echo no)
echo -n "current-dns: "; grep nameserver /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' '
echo ""

PEOF
echo "=== 192.168.0.196 ==="
